content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "看醫生",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "醫生",
          "text": "你好，請問你哪裡不舒服？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ nǎlǐ bù shūfu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 na3li3 bu4 shu1fu?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, where do you feel uncomfortable?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 어디가 불편하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "醫生你好，我昨天開始頭痛，還有點發燒。",
          "pinyin": "Yīshēng nǐ hǎo, wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ tóutòng, hái yǒu diǎn fāshāo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi1sheng1 ni3 hao3, wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 tou2tong4, hai2 you3 dian3 fa1shao1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello doctor, I started having a headache yesterday and also have a slight fever.",
          "translation_ko": "선생님 안녕하세요, 어제부터 두통이 있고 열도 조금 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "醫生",
          "text": "我幫你量一下體溫。請坐，等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nǐ liáng yīxià tǐwēn. Qǐng zuò, děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 ni3 liang2 yi1xia4 ti3wen1. Qing3 zuo4, deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Let me take your temperature. Please sit down and wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "체온을 재 드릴게요. 앉아서 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝醫生。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxiè yīshēng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie4 yi1sheng1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you doctor.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다 선생님."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "醫生",
          "text": "體溫有點高，是感冒了。我開藥給你，記得按時吃。",
          "pinyin": "Tǐwēn yǒu diǎn gāo, shì gǎnmào le. Wǒ kāi yào gěi nǐ, jìde ànshí chī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ti3wen1 you3 dian3 gao1, shi4 gan3mao4 le. Wo3 kai1 yao4 gei3 ni3, ji4de an4shi2 chi1.",
          "translation_en": "Your temperature is a bit high, it's a cold. I'll prescribe some medicine for you, remember to take it on time.",
          "translation_ko": "체온이 좀 높네요, 감기예요. 약을 처방해 드릴게요, 시간 맞춰 드세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，我會按時吃藥。謝謝醫生！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ huì ànshí chī yào. Xièxiè yīshēng!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 hui4 an4shi2 chi1 yao4. Xie4xie4 yi1sheng1!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I will take the medicine on time. Thank you doctor!",
          "translation_ko": "네, 시간 맞춰 약 먹을게요. 감사합니다 선생님!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the patient's symptom?",
          "question_ko": "환자의 증상은 무엇인가요?",
          "options_en": ["Headache and fever", "Stomachache", "Cough"],
          "options_ko": ["두통과 발열", "복통", "기침"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a time you visited a doctor. What did you say?"
    },
    {
      "title": "跟房東說問題",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "房東你好，不好意思打擾你。",
          "pinyin": "Fángdōng nǐ hǎo, bù hǎo yìsi dǎrǎo nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fang2dong1 ni3 hao3, bu4 hao3 yi4si da3rao3 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Hello landlord, sorry to bother you.",
          "translation_ko": "집주인님 안녕하세요, 방해해서 죄송합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "沒關係，有什麼事嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, yǒu shénme shì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi, you3 shen2me shi4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, what's the matter?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 무슨 일이세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "房間的冷氣壞掉了，天氣很熱，可以請人來修嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Fángjiān de lěngqì huài diào le, tiānqì hěn rè, kěyǐ qǐng rén lái xiū ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fang2jian1 de leng3qi4 huai4 diao4 le, tian1qi4 hen3 re4, ke3yi3 qing3 ren2 lai2 xiu1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "The air conditioner in the room is broken, the weather is very hot, can you ask someone to fix it?",
          "translation_ko": "방 에어컨이 고장 났어요, 날씨가 너무 더워서 수리하러 사람을 보내 주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "好的，我明天請師傅過去看看。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ míngtiān qǐng shīfu guòqù kànkan.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 ming2tian1 qing3 shi1fu guo4qu4 kan4kan.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll ask a technician to come take a look tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 내일 기사님을 보내서 확인해 드릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房客",
          "text": "太好了，謝謝房東！",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, xièxiè fángdōng!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le, xie4xie4 fang2dong1!",
          "translation_en": "That's great, thank you landlord!",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요, 감사합니다 집주인님!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is broken in the room?",
          "question_ko": "방에서 무엇이 고장 났나요?",
          "options_en": ["The air conditioner", "The refrigerator", "The light"],
          "options_ko": ["에어컨", "냉장고", "전등"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a problem you had in your apartment and how you told the landlord."
    },
    {
      "title": "約朋友看電影",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 시간 있어요? 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！我想看那部新的台灣電影，聽說很好看。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒ xiǎng kàn nà bù xīn de Táiwān diànyǐng, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Wo3 xiang3 kan4 na4 bu4 xin1 de Tai2wan1 dian4ying3, ting1shuo1 hen3 hao3kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Sure! I want to see that new Taiwanese movie, I heard it's very good.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 그 새 대만 영화 보고 싶었어요, 재미있다고 들었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那我們星期六下午兩點在電影院門口見面，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen xīngqīliù xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3men xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Then let's meet at the movie theater entrance on Saturday at 2 PM, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 토요일 오후 2시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，星期六見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, xīngqīliù jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, xing1qi1liu4 jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem, see you on Saturday!",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 토요일에 봐요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What day are they meeting?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 무슨 요일에 만나기로 했나요?",
          "options_en": ["Saturday", "Sunday", "Friday"],
          "options_ko": ["토요일", "일요일", "금요일"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a plan you made with a friend to see a movie."
    }
  ]
}
